summary: P1 Performance Task Testing Complete. All 18 backend pagination tests passed (100%). Frontend code splitting verified - all lazy-loaded pages (MissionControl, AthleteDashboard) load correctly via React.lazy + Suspense.
critical_code_review_comments: pagination.py: paginate_list() and paginate_query() utilities correctly implement pagination with consistent envelope {items, total, page, page_size, total_pages}
athletes.py: GET /api/athletes correctly returns raw array without params (backward compat) and pagination envelope with params
director_inbox.py: GET /api/director-inbox correctly preserves count/highCount in both paginated and non-paginated responses
notifications.py: GET /api/notifications correctly uses 'notifications' key instead of 'items' in pagination envelope
support_messages.py: GET /api/support-messages/inbox correctly preserves total_unread in pagination response
App.js: React.lazy imports for 45+ page components with Suspense wrapper around Routes for code splitting
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data - no new seed data created
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Performance task testing complete (iteration 243). All 18 backend pagination tests passed verifying: (1) GET /api/athletes with ?page=1&page_size=2 returns paginated envelope, (2) GET /api/athletes without params returns raw array (backward compat), (3) GET /api/director-inbox with pagination returns envelope with count/highCount, (4) GET /api/notifications with pagination returns envelope with 'notifications' key, (5) GET /api/athletes/{id}/timeline and /notes with pagination work correctly, (6) GET /api/support-messages/inbox with pagination preserves total_unread, (7) Edge cases: page=999 returns empty items, page_size>200 returns 422 validation error. Frontend code splitting verified: Login page (eagerly loaded), MissionControl (lazy-loaded for director/coach), AthleteDashboard (lazy-loaded for athlete) all load correctly.

backend_pagination.athletes_with_pagination: PASS - returns {items, total, page, page_size, total_pages}
backend_pagination.athletes_page_2: PASS - returns different items than page 1
backend_pagination.athletes_page_999: PASS - returns empty items with correct total
backend_pagination.notifications_with_pagination: PASS - returns {notifications, total, page, page_size, total_pages}
backend_pagination.timeline_with_pagination: PASS - returns envelope with pagination fields
backend_pagination.notes_with_pagination: PASS - returns {notes, total, page, page_size, total_pages}

frontend_code_splitting.director_mission_control: PASS - lazy-loaded via React.lazy, loads after login
frontend_code_splitting.coach_mission_control: PASS - lazy-loaded via React.lazy, loads after login
frontend_code_splitting.athlete_dashboard: PASS - lazy-loaded via React.lazy, loads after login
